emails.subject: RE: Credit Review
emails.body: RE: Credit Review Gerald, Russell informed me that we are amending the current Master Physical that we have with them. Since I am just being informed of any changes, I would like to know the purpose for the ammendment. -Darren 31436

emails.subject: RE: Credit Review
emails.body: Thanks for the update, I will complete a review and send the worksheet up first thing in the morning. Please let me know if that will be a problem. -d

emails.subject: RE: Credit Review

emails.subject: Credit Review
emails.body: Credit Review Darren, Please prepare a credit ticket for Sierra Pacific Power Company. Per Russell Diamonds request, I am forwarding this to your attention. Let me know if you need anything else.

emails.subject: Credit Review
emails.body: Credit Review Darren, Please prepare a credit ticket for Sierra Pacific Power Company. Per Russell Diamonds request, I am forwarding this to your attention. Let me know if you need anything else.

emails.subject: RE: Credit Review
emails.body: Darren, Since the Master is an old vintage, we are amending to reflect the current version and specifically any credit revisions that are necessary. The old master was only set up for 6 month or less term deals with volumes of 15,000 MMBtu or less. Darren Vanek/ENRON@enronXgate 03/28/2001 04:02 PM
